# kubeseal_certificate (Data Source)

Fetches the sealing certificate from the sealed-secrets controller.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `certificate` (String) PEM-encoded sealing certificate from the controller.
- `id` (String) Identifier in the format namespace/name.
